versions.version_description: In the key of Dm, probably much easier for most people to play.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Alessia Cara "Here" Acoustic
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UhRItoiAW0c

[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm sorry if I seem uninterested[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Or I'm not listenin', or I'm indifferent[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Truly I ain't got no business here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
But since my friends are here, I just came to kick it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
But really I would rather be at home all by myself[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Not in this room with people who don't even care about my well-being[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
I don't dance, don't ask, I don't need a boyfriend[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
So you can, go back, please enjoy your party[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'll be here, Somewhere in the corner[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Under clouds of marijuana, With this boy who's hollering[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can hardly hear, Over this music I don't listen to[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]
And I don't wanna get with you, So tell my friends that I'll be over here[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh here, oh-oh-oh here[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh I asked myself, what am I doin' here?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh here, oh-oh-oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Excuse me if I seem a little unimpressed with this[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
An anti-social pessimist, but usually I don't mess with this[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
And I know you mean only the best and your[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
Intentions aren't to bother me, But honestly I'd rather be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Somewhere with my people, We can kick it and just listen to[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Some music with a message, like we usually do[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]
And we'll discuss our big dreams, How we plan to take over the planet[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
So pardon my manners, I hope you'll understand that I'll be here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
Not there in the kitchen, With the girl who's always gossiping about her friends[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
So tell them I'll be here, Right next to the boy who's throwin' up[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]E[/ch]
Cause he can't take what's in his cup no more[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh God why am I here?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh here, oh-oh-oh here[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh I asked myself, what am I doin' here?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh here, oh-oh-oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out of here[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]                  
Hours later congregating next to the refrigerator[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Some girl talkin' 'bout her haters, she ain't got none[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
How did it ever come to this? I should've never come to this[/tab]
   E                                                (mute until Dm)
So holla at me, I'll be in the car when you're done
[tab]                                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm stand-offish, don't want what you're offerin'[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
And I'm done talkin', awfully sad it had to be that way[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
So tell my people when they're ready that I'm ready[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
And I'm standin' by the TV with my beanie low[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Yo I'll be over here[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh here, oh-oh-oh here[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh I asked myself, what am I doin' here?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh here, oh-oh-oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out of here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
If you're ready then I'm ready yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
If you're ready then I'm ready yeah yeah[/tab]
